creator: tate@tateoka.org
text:
This problem can fix by following patch:

BEGIN--- cut here ---
diff -c -r xdm-1.1.4.DIST/config/Xreset.cpp xdm-1.1.4/config/Xreset.cpp
*** xdm-1.1.4.DIST/config/Xreset.cpp Tue Nov  7 07:02:49 2006
--- xdm-1.1.4/config/Xreset.cpp Fri Jun  1 11:17:36 2007
***************
*** 2,5 ****
  XCOMM Deregister a login. (Derived from TakeConsole as follows:)
  XCOMM
  BINDIR/sessreg -d -w "/var/log/wtmp" -u "/var/run/utmp" \
!  -x "XDMCONFIGDIR/Xservers" -l $DISPLAY -h "" $USER
--- 2,5 ----
  XCOMM Deregister a login. (Derived from TakeConsole as follows:)
  XCOMM
  BINDIR/sessreg -d -w "/var/log/wtmp" -u "/var/run/utmp" \
!  -x XDMCONFIGDIR/Xservers -l $DISPLAY -h "" $USER
diff -c -r xdm-1.1.4.DIST/config/Xstartup.cpp xdm-1.1.4/config/Xstartup.cpp
*** xdm-1.1.4.DIST/config/Xstartup.cpp Tue Nov  7 07:02:40 2006
--- xdm-1.1.4/config/Xstartup.cpp Fri Jun  1 11:17:42 2007
***************
*** 2,5 ****
  XCOMM Register a login (derived from GiveConsole as follows:)
  XCOMM
  BINDIR/sessreg  -a -w "/var/log/wtmp" -u "/var/run/utmp" \
!  -x "XDMCONFIGDIR/Xservers" -l $DISPLAY -h "" $USER
--- 2,5 ----
  XCOMM Register a login (derived from GiveConsole as follows:)
  XCOMM
  BINDIR/sessreg  -a -w "/var/log/wtmp" -u "/var/run/utmp" \
!  -x XDMCONFIGDIR/Xservers -l $DISPLAY -h "" $USER
diff -c -r xdm-1.1.4.DIST/greeter/greet.c xdm-1.1.4/greeter/greet.c
*** xdm-1.1.4.DIST/greeter/greet.c Sat Feb  3 10:25:25 2007
--- xdm-1.1.4/greeter/greet.c Fri Jun  1 11:00:41 2007
***************
*** 541,548 ****
       (*pamhp, PAM_RHOST, hostname));
    free(hostname);
       }
!  } else
!      RUN_AND_CHECK_PAM_ERROR(pam_set_item, (*pamhp, PAM_TTY, d->name));
   
   if (!greet->allow_null_passwd) {
       pam_flags |= PAM_DISALLOW_NULL_AUTHTOK;
--- 541,548 ----
       (*pamhp, PAM_RHOST, hostname));
    free(hostname);
       }
!  }
!  RUN_AND_CHECK_PAM_ERROR(pam_set_item, (*pamhp, PAM_TTY, d->name));
   
   if (!greet->allow_null_passwd) {
       pam_flags |= PAM_DISALLOW_NULL_AUTHTOK;
END--- cut here ---
